title: Budget Template, Recurring Planner & Import Wizard QA
testingOrder: Start with Section 1 (Template page). Then test Recurring in Section 2. Finally test the Import Wizard in Section 3. Section 4 covers edge cases.

groups.name: Navigation & Loading
items: Navigate to /budget/template — page loads with spinner, then shows categories
Page title shows 'Budget Template' with subtitle 'Your default monthly starting point'
All income categories appear in the Income section with green header
All expense categories appear grouped by group_name with colored square indicators
3 KPI cards show: Template Income (green), Template Expenses, Net (green if positive, red if negative)
Link from Budget page header → 'Template' navigates to /budget/template

groups.name: Inline Editing
items: Click an empty '—' amount → input appears with focus and selection
Type a number and press Enter → value saves, toast shows 'Template updated'
Type a number and click away (blur) → value saves
Press Escape while editing → edit cancels, no save
Edit an existing amount to 0 or clear it → template entry deleted, shows '—', toast shows 'Template entry removed'
KPI cards update immediately after editing
Group totals update immediately after editing

groups.name: Permissions
items: As a member WITHOUT budgets.edit → amount cells are not clickable (disabled/dimmed)
As admin/owner → amount cells are clickable

groups.name: Mobile
items: On mobile viewport: KPI grid shows 2 columns instead of 3
Income and expense cards have tighter padding on mobile
Inline editing works on mobile (inputMode=decimal shows numeric keyboard)

groups.name: Navigation & Loading
items: Navigate to /budget/recurring — page loads with list of recurring items (or empty state)
Page title shows 'Recurring Planner' with subtitle
Annual Recurring Total KPI shows sum of (amount × month count) across all items
Link from Budget page header → 'Recurring' navigates to /budget/recurring

groups.name: List View
items: Desktop: table with columns Label, Category, Amount, Months, Actions
Items sorted by next upcoming month
Month chips show abbreviated month names as blue pill badges
Edit button opens modal pre-filled with item data
Delete button uses ConfirmDeleteButton pattern (click once → 'Confirm Delete?', click again → deletes)
After delete: item removed, toast shown, total KPI updates

groups.name: Calendar View
items: Toggle to Calendar view — shows vertical ledger layout
Month header rows (uppercase name + total) with item rows indented below
Only months with items are shown (empty months hidden)
Each item row shows label, category sub_name, and amount

groups.name: Add/Edit Modal
items: Click '+ Add Item' → modal opens with empty form
Label field is required — submit without label shows error
Category dropdown groups options by group_name (optgroups)
Amount field is optional — can leave blank
Month selector: click month chips to toggle selection
At least one month required — submit without months shows error
Submit with valid data → item created, modal closes, list refreshes, toast shown
Edit existing item → modal pre-fills all fields, save updates item

groups.name: Mobile
items: Mobile: list shows card-style layout instead of grid table
Add/edit modal renders as bottom sheet on mobile
Calendar view works on mobile with proper spacing

groups.name: Opening & Data Loading
items: 'Import from Template' button visible on Budget page header (desktop and mobile)
Button is disabled for members without budgets.edit permission
Click button → wizard modal opens, data loaded from template + recurring + existing budget
If no template entries exist → Step 1 shows empty state with link to /budget/template

groups.name: Step 1 — Template Review
items: Step indicator shows 3 steps with first highlighted
Title shows 'Step 1 of 3 — Import Monthly Template'
Subtitle shows the month being imported into
Categories grouped by group_name with group headers
Desktop: column headers show Category, Template, Current, Action
Categories with no existing budget show green 'Add' badge
Categories WITH existing budget show conflict dropdown (Skip/Overwrite/Add)
Conflict dropdown defaults to 'Skip'
Bulk action dropdown at top: set all conflicts to Skip/Overwrite/Add at once
Click 'Next →' advances to Step 2

groups.name: Step 2 — Recurring Items
items: Title shows 'Step 2 of 3 — Recurring Items for {month}'
If no recurring items for this month → shows empty state with link to /budget/recurring
Each item has checkbox, label, category, amount input
Items with preset amounts show pre-filled input
Items without preset amounts show empty input with placeholder
Uncheck an item → it's excluded from import
'← Back' returns to Step 1 preserving all selections
'Next →' advances to Step 3

groups.name: Step 3 — Review & Apply
items: Title shows 'Step 3 of 3 — Review Changes'
Summary shows counts: adds, overwrites, skipped, recurring items included
Individual items listed showing what will happen (add/overwrite/recurring)
'← Back' returns to Step 2 preserving all selections
Click 'Apply Changes' → imports budget, toast shows results (X created, Y updated)
After apply: wizard closes, budget page refreshes with new values
Budget values on page match what was imported

groups.name: Edge Cases
items: Import into a month with zero existing budget → all template items are 'Add' (no conflicts)
Import into a month with ALL categories already budgeted → all template items show conflicts
Recurring item with null amount, user enters 0 → item not imported (skipped)
Cancel at any step → wizard closes, no changes made
Import same month twice → second import shows all conflicts (previous values exist)

groups.name: Data Consistency
items: Template amounts persist across page reloads
Recurring items persist across page reloads
Imported budget values show correctly on the main Budget page
Budget summary KPIs (Budgeted Income, Budgeted Expenses) reflect imported values
Owner filter on Budget page works correctly with imported values

groups.name: Dark Mode
items: Budget Template page renders correctly in dark mode
Recurring Planner page renders correctly in dark mode
Import wizard modal renders correctly in dark mode
All text is readable, borders visible, inputs styled in dark mode

groups.name: Navigation
items: Budget page → Template link works
Budget page → Recurring link works
Browser back button works correctly from Template/Recurring pages
Direct URL access to /budget/template works
Direct URL access to /budget/recurring works
